claim: Recently discovered satellite photos from Google Earth show that an ancient civilization built pyramids in Antarctica 100 million years ago.

result.claim: Recently discovered satellite photos from Google Earth show that an ancient civilization built pyramids in Antarctica 100 million years ago.
result.reasoning: A thorough search of the knowledge base for propositions related to "pyramids Antarctica" and "ancient civilization Antarctica" yielded no relevant results. The propositions returned were either empty or pertained to unrelated scientific topics. There is no evidence within the provided knowledge base to support or refute the claim that an ancient civilization built pyramids in Antarctica 100 million years ago, or that Google Earth satellite photos show such structures.
